metadata.description: Basile's personal collection of reusable Claude Code skills

plugins.name: implement
plugins.description: Plan, implement, and review a feature or refactor using an agent team. Loops until reviewer approves or 3 rounds exhausted.

plugins.name: pm-spec
plugins.description: Acts as a Product Manager to gather requirements and create feature specifications.

plugins.name: pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Spawn a team of specialized agents to review a PR from GitHub or GitLab, score issues on a 0-100 confidence scale, and filter to high-confidence findings.

plugins.name: pr-comment-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze PR review comments with two agents debating devil's-advocate style, then produce casual copy-pasteable replies.
